submit_method: GUI per baseline #1299/#1320. Anti-debugger compliant: NO DevTools, NO CDP. Opened a fresh chatglm.cn tab via the address bar in a new Chrome tab, hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R) to the clean ChatGLM SPA (model GLM-5.1, guest mode 访客_fbfb46). Set OS clipboard to the PII prompt, clicked the chat input editor (focused), pasted with Ctrl+V (clean Hangul — input value verified == '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' before submit), then pressed Enter to send.
warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.

warning_evidence.delivery: inline chat-bubble (assistant response replaced, NOT page-replacement)

regression_vs_baseline: MATCH (PASS -> PASS, stable). chatglm uses ws (WebSocket) family, NOT the ws_socketio family that W5.3 migrated (wrtn_socket_io, DB row id=88). The W5.3 wrtn_socket_io -> DB-driven emit_ws_envelope (3-frame split-wrap) refactor does NOT touch chatglm's code path. Baselines #1213(W1W2)/#1234(W3)/#1256(W4W6)/#1277(W5.0)/#1299(W5.1)/#1320(W5.2) all PASS — engine intercepts the chatglm WS stream and replaces the assistant response with the full Korean block warning '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.'. #1343 W5.3 re-run reproduces it identically: same inline chat-bubble warning, full '차단되었습니다' present, engine_intercept_fired=true, warning_rendered=true, verified at ~12s post-submit AND persisted past the 120s mark (~150s+). No regression — chatglm remains byte-identical to all prior baselines, confirming the W5.3 wrtn migration left the other non-wrtn services intact.
notes: W5.3 regression re-run of chatglm check-warning via GUI method (anti-debugger: no DevTools/CDP). Fresh chatglm.cn tab, hard reload, GLM-5.1, guest (访客_fbfb46). PII pasted via clipboard+Ctrl+V (input value confirmed correct pre-send), submitted with Enter. Post-submit the ChatGLM assistant bubble was replaced by the engine block warning '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.' containing the full '차단되었습니다'. User bubble shows the PII prompt echoed; no model answer leaked. Confirmed at ~12s and again past 120s — warning stable. Matches W1-W5.2 baselines. chatglm is ws-family, unaffected by the W5.3 ws_socketio (wrtn) migration. verdict=PASS.
screenshots_note: Verdict rests on two windows-mcp Snapshot reads of the rendered DOM (at ~12s and >120s post-submit) showing the inline ChatGLM block warning with full '차단되었습니다'. Conclusive.
status_detail: PASS — engine replaced ChatGLM assistant response with inline block warning containing full '차단되었습니다', matches W1-W5.2 baseline (W5.3 wrtn ws_socketio migration did not affect chatglm, a ws-family service)
